transcript:
[Meeting date: 2026-07-14]
[00:00] You: Management sync. Both managers are here today.
[00:30] Speaker 1: As the engineering manager, I'll handle the performance reviews for my team. I'll complete all reviews by July 28th.
[01:00] Speaker 2: As the product manager, I need to coordinate the Q3 roadmap presentation. I'll own that and have it ready by July 21st.
[01:40] You: Speaker 2, can you also make sure the engineering team gets the updated requirements doc?
[01:55] Speaker 2: That's actually more of an engineering concern. Speaker 1, can you distribute it?
[02:10] Speaker 1: Sure, I'll send the updated requirements doc to my engineering team by end of day today.
[02:40] You: Good. Also, the budget request for next quarter — who owns that?
[02:55] Speaker 1: Engineering budget is mine. I'll submit the engineering budget request by July 18th.
[03:20] Speaker 2: Product budget is mine. I'll submit the product team budget request by July 18th as well.
[03:45] Speaker 1: I'll also schedule the team's technical roadmap review with the leadership team for July 25th.

adversarial_injections.description: You asked 'Speaker 2' to distribute the requirements doc, but Speaker 2 redirected to Speaker 1 who explicitly accepted — attribution bait: an item asked of Speaker 2 but accepted by Speaker 1

action_items.description: Complete Q3 performance reviews for engineering team
action_items.source_quote: I'll complete all reviews by July 28th.
I'll own that and have it ready by July 21st.
